_meta.purpose: Tumour marker reference cut-offs + follow-up logic for the rules engine + LLM. Tumour markers are mainly for MONITORING known cancer + specific work-ups, NOT population screening (except PSA/AFP in context). Interpret trends, not single values. Decision support only.
_meta.source: Standard tumour-marker reference cut-offs + guideline usage. Curated for JORINOVA NEXUS; assay-specific.

psa.name: Prostate-specific antigen (PSA)
psa.note: Age-specific cut-offs; use free:total PSA + velocity. Not diagnostic alone.

afp.name: Alpha-fetoprotein (AFP)
afp.note: HCC surveillance in cirrhosis; germ-cell staging with hCG/LDH.

ca125.name: CA-125
ca125.note: Use with imaging + RMI/ROMA; not for screening asymptomatic women.

ca19_9.name: CA 19-9
ca19_9.note: Undetectable in Lewis-antigen-negative people. Correlate with bilirubin.

beta_hcg.name: Beta-hCG (tumour)
beta_hcg.note: Very high -> molar/choriocarcinoma; also germ-cell staging.

thyroglobulin.name: Thyroglobulin
thyroglobulin.note: Should be ~undetectable after total thyroidectomy + RAI; check anti-Tg antibody interference.

paraprotein.name: Serum paraprotein (M-protein)
paraprotein.note: Any monoclonal band is abnormal; quantify + free light chains + immunofixation. See hematology_neoplasms.json.
